hero.headline: Tech-Enabled Construction. Quality Assured.
hero.subline: Transparent pricing, assured quality, and on-time homes — delivered with 24+ years of excellence and 450+ quality checks per build.

vision_mission.title: Our Vision
vision_mission.body: To make home construction simple, transparent, and reliable for every land owner.

vision_mission.title: Our Mission
vision_mission.body: To combine engineering excellence, top-grade materials, and customer-first service for the best construction experience. 24+ YEARS OF EXPERIENCE

why_choose.title: 24+ Years Excellence
why_choose.body: Award-winning architectural design and construction expertise.

why_choose.title: 450+ Quality Checks
why_choose.body: Comprehensive quality assurance at every stage ensuring exceptional standards.

why_choose.title: On-Time Delivery
why_choose.body: 98% of projects completed on schedule. We value your time and commitments.

why_choose.title: Transparent Pricing
why_choose.body: No hidden costs. Complete cost breakdown provided upfront with detailed quotations.

why_choose.title: Expert Team
why_choose.body: 50+ skilled professionals including licensed architects and certified contractors.

why_choose.title: Live Tracking
why_choose.body: Real-time construction updates enabling clients to monitor progress anytime.

process.title: Consultation & Planning
process.body: We understand your vision, requirements, and budget. Free site visit and feasibility analysis included.

process.title: Design & Approvals
process.body: Our architects prepare detailed plans and 3D views. Multiple optimized design options provided.

process.title: Foundation & Structure
process.body: Construction begins with strong foundations and structural work using premium-grade materials.

process.title: Construction & Finishing
process.body: MEP, interiors, flooring, painting, and fixtures completed as per approved specifications.

process.title: Final Handover
process.body: Quality inspection, final walkthrough, documentation, and smooth handover of your home.

technology.title: Digital Planning Access
technology.body: Your vision, digitally enabled Live project timelines Online approvals 3D views 02

technology.title: Material & Labor Tracking
technology.body: Know onsite activities clearly Activity reports Material tracking Quality updates 03

technology.title: Live Site Updates
technology.body: See progress clearly daily Daily site updates Photos and videos Milestone alerts 04

technology.title: Smart Project Control
technology.body: Complete project transparency Smart system alerts Real-time progress Budget tracking 05

technology.title: Digital Handover Care
technology.body: Everything safely documented 24×7 project access Digital records Lifetime support

warranty.title: Structure Warranty
warranty.body: Up to 15 Years Coverage on structural integrity

warranty.title: Window Profiles
warranty.body: Up to 10 Years Warranty on window frames & profiles

warranty.title: Interiors & Finish
warranty.body: Up to 5 Years Wardrobe, Modular Kitchen, Vanity & similar items
warranty.description: Wardrobe, Modular Kitchen, Vanity & similar items

warranty.title: Internal Doors
warranty.body: Up to 5 Years Coverage on all internal door units
warranty.description: Coverage on all internal door units

warranty.title: Seepage Protection
warranty.body: Up to 1 Year Extended warranty for seepage, electrical wiring & cracks in paint / plaster can be obtained at an additional cost of Rs 15 / Sq.ft / Annum
warranty.description: Extended warranty for seepage, electrical wiring & cracks in paint / plaster can be obtained at an additional cost of Rs 15 / Sq.ft / Annum

warranty.title: Anti-Termite
warranty.body: Up to 1 Year Treatment coverage against termites

warranty.title: Electrical Wiring
warranty.body: Up to 1 Year On all electrical wiring used by ZuildUp
warranty.description: On all electrical wiring used by ZuildUp

warranty.title: General & AMC
warranty.body: Up to 1 Year Everything else done by ZuildUp + AMC
warranty.description: Everything else done by ZuildUp + AMC

warranty.title: 3rd Party Products
warranty.body: Up to Manufacturer As provided by the original manufacturer
warranty.description: As provided by the original manufacturer
